steps.title: Use the record context
steps.content: The sentence says Tmesipteris oblanceolata has the largest known eukaryote genome. Because extremely large genomes have high biological costs, the passage suggests that an even larger genome is unlikely to appear and replace that record.

steps.title: Choose the record word
steps.content: A means prolonged, which does not fit a size record. C means reduced, and D means made unnecessary; neither describes another organism exceeding the record. The needed word means surpassed or replaced by something that comes after it. The answer is B.
